title: ononis spinosa var. antiquorum
intro: Ononis spinosa var. antiquorum, also known as the Spiny Restharrow or Old Restharrow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the legume family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Ononis spinosa var. antiquorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
